plugin: NetworkService Tripp Lite UPS PDU Environmental SNMP
plugin_desc: Tripp Lite UPS, PDU and environmental monitor SNMP baseline child template for network-service devices under Tripp Lite PEN 3417. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Current public facts confirm PowerAlert-managed UPS, PDU and environmental sensor SNMP capability plus official MIB file names, but do not prove stable shared CPU, memory, fan or power-health scalar semantics, so private UPS/PDU/environmental business counters are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
